response.overview: A man wonders around the yellow bloomed countryside with a pair of boots, a revolver, and a glass bottle of water to quench his thirst. Though, when the bottle goes dry, a perplexing opponent is born that will even cause the 'supposed' sharpest of gunslingers to go mad.
response.tagline: I FIRED. I TOOK A SIP. I MISSED.
response.title: Wild Glass
